allow: PowerShell($p = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } else { "not in default location"; Get-Command pio -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 16)
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell($tools = @\(\); foreach\($c in 'g++','gcc','python','python3'\){ $p=\(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){$tools += "$c -> $\($p.Source\)"} }; $tools; "---pyais---"; try { python -c "import pyais,sys; print\('pyais', pyais.__version__\)" } catch { "no pyais" })
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($p = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\('COM5',115200,'None',8,'One'\); $p.ReadTimeout = 500; try { $p.Open\(\) } catch { "Kunne ikke aapne COM5: $_"; return }; $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; $end = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $end\) { try { $line = $p.ReadLine\(\); [void]$sb.AppendLine\($line\) } catch { } }; $p.Close\(\); $sb.ToString\(\))
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)

PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; if \($?\) { & "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 })

PowerShell($p = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\('COM5',115200,'None',8,'One'\); $p.ReadTimeout = 500; try { $p.Open\(\) } catch { "Kunne ikke aapne COM5: $_"; return }; $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder; $end = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(40\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $end\) { try { $line = $p.ReadLine\(\); if\($line -match 'AIS>'\){ [void]$sb.AppendLine\($line\) } } catch { } }; $p.Close\(\); $sb.ToString\(\))
PowerShell(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe" run -e esp8266 -t upload --upload-port COM5 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)
